name: Private Gateways to North Vietnam 2 Weeks
duration: Places:Hanoi - Sapa - Ha Giang -  Cao Bang - Halong Bay
highlights: Discover the bustling streets, vibrant markets, and cultural landmarks of Vietnam's capital city
Engage with local communities, learn about traditional crafts, and taste authentic Vietnamese cuisine
Trek through the stunning terraced rice fields and visit ethnic minority villages in Sapa
Experience the beauty of Halong Bay's limestone islands and enjoy on-deck wellness activities

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
Morning/ Afternoon

On your first day in Vietnam, our tour guide will be waiting to meet you at the airport when you land in Hanoi. Arrive at your hotel, which is centrally located in Hanoi, after a brief drive. When you arrive, check in, unpack, and then take the remainder of the day to unwind. Night

Run through the neighborhood on your own or sign up for a quick night tour as shown below to see the city at night with our entertaining local guide. You may still choose the optional Hanoi cuisine Tour by Motorbike at Night to discover the vibrant local culture after the sun sets while riding o...

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Full Day - Explore Hanoi’s Highlights
itinerary.description:
Morning

After eating breakfast at the hotel, the tour leader will pick you up there. The first university in Vietnam to envision a competition during multiple King dynasties was the Temple of Literature. A lot of candidates and students visit the temple nowadays to pray for success in their academic efforts, in addition to being a draw because of its historical significance. Then move to the constructed completely of wood and resting on a pillar constructed of a single piece of stone, the One Pillar Pagoda is a revered symbol of the Hanoi people. It was finished in 1049

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Rural Adventure to Duong Lam Ancient Village
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your hotel offers breakfast for you, so please enjoy it to get your energy before your new trip today to the earliest ancient town in Vietnam, Duong Lam Village. Our driver and guide will pick you up at your hotel and take you there. Enjoy a bicycle ride through the narrow, historic lanes of Mong Phu village, where you'll visit the Mong Phu Temple and explore the charming streets that reflect centuries of history. Experience the rural side of Vietnam by observing how local farmers work in the surrounding rice fields. This unique perspective gives you a glimpse into traditional Vietnam...

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Sapa - Discover the Beauty of Cat Cat Village
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at your hotel to start the day, then pack your bags and get ready for the journey. Be prepared for a lengthy trip, which frequently takes around 6 hours to get to Sapa. Let’s arrive at Sapa and see the breathtaking scenery that is characterized by steep valleys, majestic mountain peaks, and historic ethnic towns before check-in and unwinding at your hotel. Just visit a neighboring eatery for lunch. Afternoon

You ought to travel to Muong Hoa Valley and Cat Cat Village

itinerary.title: Sapa Trekking Expedition - Y Linh Ho, Lao Chai, and Ta Van Villages
itinerary.description:
Morning

You will be picked up by a local tour guide after breakfast to start your trekking adventure. Please climb to Y Linh Ho and Lao Chai communities, two of Sapa's most well-known communities, as part of this excursion. Explore historical relics like the house's surrounding stone walls and cave dwellings. Visit Ta Van Village, the Zay people's ancestral home, and spend some time getting to know their vibrant culture. It will be an experience you won't soon forget

itinerary.title: Off-the-Beaten-Path Sapa Trekking - Suoi Thau, Ma Tra, and Ta Phin
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Hiking 9 km

Morning

Let’s taste your nutritious breakfast in the hotel

At 08:00: We will pick you up and drive you the 5 kilometers to the villages of Suoi Thau and Ma Tra. Get to know the Hmong, a relatively small-scale native population, and exchange stories and experiences with them. Take a 9-kilometer hike that passes through nearby cities, villages, rice, and maize fields as you continue your journey. You should prepare a picnic lunch to enjoy while traveling

itinerary.title: Sapa to Ha Giang - Into the Heart of Vietnam’s Wild North
itinerary.description:
Morning

After eating breakfast, get ready to leave. Our guide will take you on a shuttle bus to Ha Giang. There are 17 different ethnic minority groups present in Ha Giang, which is home to Vietnam's border with China. The trip there will take you close to seven hours to drive 235 kilometers away. Afternoon

When you reach Ha Giang, our guide will assist you in finding the hotel and completing the check-in process

itinerary.title: Ha Giang - Conquer the Winding Roads to Dong Van
itinerary.description:
Morning

Take advantage of the hotel's breakfast service. Our tour guide will pick you up so you can continue taking in the Ha Giang province's sights as you travel. Make your way down Bac Xum's descent. Pay attention to the naturally existing hills made of finely crushed limestones as you arrive at Fairy Bosom, a popular tourist destination in the Quan Ba region of Ha Giang. These hills are what give the area its recognizable features

itinerary.title: Ha Giang - Cao Bang - Untamed Landscapes and Hidden Trails
itinerary.description:
Morning

Participate in the Dong Van Kermess, which is held in the middle of the town once a week and serves as a location for amusement, interethnic dialogue, and the trading of goods. crossing the Ma Pi Leng pass, one of the four highest crossings over the Vietnam border, to get to Meo Vac. As you travel, enjoy the views of the Nho Que River from a higher vantage point. Be sure to stop at the Meo Vac Village before enjoying lunch at a restaurant that has received high praise from the locals. Afternoon

Row a boat to further explore the serene Nho Que River

itinerary.title: Cao Bang - Journey to the Tranquil Ba Be Lake
itinerary.description:
Morning

Let’s savor the breakfast that is served at your accommodation. Then you will visit the Ban Gioc waterfall, which is positioned just along the Vietnam-China border. This site is drawing more and more local and international tourists to appreciate it since it is one of the four largest transnational waterfalls in the world. The Nguom Ngao cave, which is situated in this area has magnificent stalactite and rock formation displays. It is becoming a more popular travel destination because of the wild beauty that is fully generated by nature and untouched by human activity

itinerary.title: Ba Be - Return to Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Before you begin your day, make sure you eat something to fill your stomach. You could also think about visiting Hua Ma Cave, a different famous spectacular cave in the same general area. Not only is this cave a gorgeous natural backdrop, but it also contains intriguing tales connected to enigmatic mythology. The best way to return to Hanoi is by shuttle bus after your half-day adventure. Afternoon

Register at your hotel in Hanoi

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise - Set Sail on a Natural Wonder
itinerary.description:
Morning

At about 08:30: You will be picked up by the shuttle van or limousine and driven to the Hanoi - Halong expressway from the Old Quarter. Then at 11:30 - 12:00, arrive at the departure port and complete the check-in process. Take a tender or shuttle boat to the leading cruise to begin your therapeutic journey in Halong Bay, which has gained a reputation as a top tourist destination thanks to its distinctive collection of limestone islands, stunning beaches, and amazing cave system. Additionally, there are several entertainment venues in the central business area, including arcades and b...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Return to Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

A lovely way to start the day is by practicing Tai Chi on Halong Bay's emerald seas. Continue sailing to other areas so you may kayak, swim, and explore the tunnels as you travel through them. Because they differ from line to line, these activities won't be uniform throughout all cruise lines. You will disembark at the harbor when your cruise is over and then board a shuttle bus or a limousine to return to Hanoi City. Afternoon

Possess some free time to indulge in your favorite activities

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure - End of an Unforgettable Adventure
itinerary.description:
Free all morning to pack your suitcase and have breakfast

Our guide will take you to the airport following your flight time. This is the end of your journey in Vietnam with Bestprice Travel. We are pleased to assist you along the way and honored to be trusted by you! Best Price hopes you had a memorable time, and we wish to see you in the future.

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and home-stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam, as per itinerary.
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
